description: This file defines a Spring Boot REST controller named MeController that provides an endpoint (/api/me) for retrieving basic authentication info about the currently authenticated user. It is part of the authentication API, specifically for debugging authentication and JWT/MFA flows.

classes.name: MeController
classes.description: REST controller providing an endpoint to retrieve current user's authentication info.

methods.name: me
methods.description: Handles GET requests to /api/me, returning user identity information from the Authentication object.
